data.content: Added forwardTransitionTarget() to src/lib/workflows.ts. Function takes (currentState, workflow) and returns the single forward transition target by filtering out rollback transitions via isRollbackTransition(). Tests in src/lib/__tests__/workflow-transition-helpers.test.ts cover all cases: queued-to-active, active-to-next-queue, rollback exclusion, terminal states, missing transitions, and builtin profiles. All 1882 tests pass, lint clean, tsc clean.
